horoscopes.title: Aries Weekly Horoscope Starting April 5
content: Get ready for more physical activity from this week onwards, as your ruler Mars will enter your sign Aries, and it will be there for long forty plus days. The king of the zodiac, the Sun is also there so, your public visibility will increase than the last few months. You will initiate conversations, take up some projects, and handle situations without someone’s support. You will also start new diet and health habits to improve your physical health like walking, exercising, or having effective schedule. At the same time, you can also expect arguments, at home as well as in the public, so you need to avoid that.

Venus’s transit is progressing through own sign Taurus, which rules your savings and spending, you will purchase new items such as clothes, food or some personal things. You will also meet with a financial consultant to discuss a new investment plan, budgeting or, some payments. Some money will come through salary, payments or freelance projects as well. The second house also indicates family, so there will be family discussions, fine dining, or discussion about family events. During this week, you will also restart your job search, apply for appraisals, or you will get updates about your promotions.

Mercury is moving through the last degrees of Pisces, which will bring secret conversations with someone. You will be interested in reading sci-fi or watching such movies, as debilitated Mercury will bring the thirst for knowledge. Someone from the past can surprisingly pop in and give you updates about something you were searching for. This is a complex phase for your physical and mental health, so you need some silent time to watch over this. Altogether, this week will bring busy schedule, and financial matters will be one of the prominent matters. Foreign collaborations, and long trips also will be coming up.

horoscopes.title: Taurus Weekly Horoscope Starting April 5
content: Taurus Sun, Moon and rising natives will have a silent start during this week, but you will pick up the pace, as they move ahead. You will handle private tasks, you will have solo projects, and complete the pending responsibilities. Mars will move into the twelfth house, and the Sun is also there, and both the planets are not very happy to be here, so make sure you keep your patience, as you may face some sensitive moments. The physical and mental health is very important, so you will go for prayer, meditation or pilgrimages too. It’s normal to feel a bit under the weather during this week, but take care of it.

Your ruler Venus is shining in the first house, and that will bring visible changes in your appearance, and daily life. You will buy some clothes or personal refinement products, as you want the best from yourself. Since Venus is the planet for beauty, people will surely notice you, and they will praise you. You will be going out, update your style, take selfies, or update your public profile. New opportunities will knock at your door, so wait for them and choose the best, so that you can progress in your life.

Transit Mercury is moving through the last degrees of Pisces, which will bring new team ventures, or you will continue with the past projects. Your social circle will expand, or you will create or update your social media profiles, and that will bring new contacts. Some people from the past will contact you again, leading to repeated conversations, but make sure you don’t share any personal information with them. Online and offline meetings, brain storming sessions, and team activities will be the highlight of this week. You will also be getting new job opportunities or invites to attend debates.

horoscopes.title: Gemini Weekly Horoscope Starting April 5
content: Please don’t play small as a bold forward-moving energy is going to define your week, as the Sun and Mars will fire up your eleventh house. A friend or a connection, can introduce you to a group or idea which will set your long term plans. Opportunities will arrive through friends, networks, or even casual conversation, so be watchful. You have the real passion, but the potential for friction is also high as both Sun and Mars are hot planets. Team building, team ventures , online and offline discussions also will be the part of this transit. There is also a chance to lead a team, which can be a quiet a surprise too.

Venus is moving through own sign Taurus, but in the twelfth house, so this will bring meaningful emotional developments. You may find yourself meeting or thinking about people from the past, or having vivid dream which reveals something important. This transit will also bring closures, which will be a release from a lingering pain. There is a room for private conversation, which can be very emotional as well. The twelfth house indicates healing, so some of you will go for such practices too. You will be highly intuitive, and there is nothing wrong in trusting that now.

Mercury transit through the tenth house is surely going to share your career and public image, so plan your next steps. Since Mercury indicates communications, you will get many calls, emails, or you will have a lot of meetings which need quick thinking. A superior or authority figure will take notice of your ideas, and they will appreciate it, so study the projects carefully. Job seekers will have the closest opportunity to get a new job, so expand their job search, and try to get good contacts through networking, and it is possible too.

horoscopes.title: Cancer Weekly Horoscope Starting April 5
content: Mars will be entering Aries, and it will be with the Sun, so, you can expect noticeable shift in career which can shape your reputation, and long term direction. The momentum will build quickly, so expect increased visibility, new responsibilities, or even you will get a project to prove yourself. There will be conversations with the manager, mentor, or authority figure which will set something important to move ahead, especially early to mid-week. However, the Sun, and Mars, both are harsh planets, there will be arguments at work, but you should stay away from them, so that you can use this transit for the progress in career.

Venus is drifting through own sign Taurus will surely bring a supportive energy to your social life and connections. The friendships will be warmer, easier, and you will surely find some likeminded people too, which will have similar goals. You will be invited to join new teams, so team meetings will be a signature event of this transit, and they can happen online or offline. Since Venus is the planet for romance, you may start getting some emotional connection with a friend. Group settings will be good for you, so, you will get collaborative projects, which can bring long term income.

Mercury, the planet for communication will bring opportunities for long trips, as it is moving through the ninth house. You will have better clarity about higher studies, religion and philosophy too, and this is a good transit for all these. This Mercury will bring some news, ideas, or discussions, which can be global in nature. You will enrol in a course, get some projects from communication and media, and some of you will publish your articles as well. The ninth house indicates fatherly figures, so they will be actively involving with you with their valuable inputs.

horoscopes.title: Leo Weekly Horoscope Starting April 5
content: Since the Sun and Mars is in Aries, so there will be a powerful undercurrent of transformation as both the planets are moving through the ninth house of truth and expansion. This is not a subtle energy, so you will get sudden insights, bold conversations, long trips, or learning new subjects. You can expect a conversation where you have to defend your ideas or stand firm in your beliefs, and please avoid being harsh in such occasions. These conversations can also happen with fatherly figures, mentors or gurus, so try to learn from them. Writers, and those who work in media will get golden opportunities to publish their work.

Venus transit through the tenth house will bring more visibility, and real-world outcomes in your career and reputation. Early this week, there will be good opportunities which can bring recognition, appreciation, or positive interaction with an influential person, and they will support you in your career. You can expect a new professional connection, or an existing situation at work will be in your favour, so be alert. Job seekers will get the closest opportunities to get a new job, so please expand the job search too. Those who work in media, creativity, business and diplomacy will have new opportunities.

Mercury is moving through the eighth house, it will bring inevitable developments regarding shared finances, commitments and deeper emotional needs. Since Mercury indicates communication, you will discuss the financial matters with a consultant, and you will discuss the possibilities for a new loan, closure of a loan, or new plans about tax, PF and insurance. There will be opportunities for repayment or an issue in the partnership too. There will be sudden expenses, so, you should save some money for such matters too. By the weekend the situations will get settled, but as long as Mercury stays in the eighth house, you must be careful with the financial matters.

horoscopes.title: Virgo Weekly Horoscope Starting April 5
content: The week will bring concrete developments for Virgo Sun, Moon and rising, as the Sun and Mras are moving through the eighth house, especially in financial matters. You should expect some specific to arise throughout this week regarding financial matters, especially about loans, which can be pending or new. Mars is the indicator of financial liabilities, so this transit is a pure red flag for your financial matters, so make sure you save as much as you can. Some sudden financial needs also will arise, so you have to be prepared for that, and there will be the need to restructure your joint accounts, tax, PF, and insurance too.

Venus transit through the ninth house will be a great relief, as it is moving through the ninth house, so it will bring positive developments, related to travel, and expansion. Early this week, you will get good news, and this can be like an approval, an invitation, or a chance to find something which can excite you. Long trip and global ventures also will be the part of this week, but it can take place sometime after as well. The week will also bring opportunities for higher studies, interaction with an international community, writing and publishing your articles too.

Mercury is moving through the last degrees of Pisces, and it will bring direct, result oriented communication with your personal and professional contacts. These conversations will be highly important, and it will bring new developments in the existing relationships, despite personal or professional. There will be social gatherings where you get opportunities to express your ideas, or you will address a pending issue. You can also expect events like marriages, parties, and business networking sessions too. If you are a lifestyle coach, or motivational speaker, this week will surely bring new opportunities as well.

horoscopes.title: Libra Weekly Horoscope Starting April 5
content: Libran Sun, Moon and rising natives will focus on their relationship as the Sun is in Aries and Mars will enter Aries this week. Both planets are dominating planets, so if you are aggressive, then there will be potential conflicts in the personal and professional domain, even though you are the peacemaker of the zodiac. Tuesdays and Thursdays will be the most challenging days, so avoid any kind of conflicts these days. There will be many opportunities to meet new people, and form new alliances. Social gatherings, for personal and business meets will be sure thing during this week, so get ready for that.

Financial matters are showing progress as Venus is moving through own sign, and eighth house, which is a green flag. This transit will bring progressive developments around shared finances, support and good relationship with your partner. You will get some financial support, approval, or a benefit which improve your financial prospects. This transit will bring healthy conversations with your life partner, and they will be ready to accept your thoughts. You will be browsing about new loans, and other financial instrument or repayment can also come up. Venus in the eighth house will surely bring healing, so there will be opportunities to go for therapies as well.

The transit Mercury will impact the sixth house and it will bring practical and quick developments in daily routine, work and responsibilities. There will be some important tasks, conversations or updates about your existing projects. If you are a job seeker, you will get updates about your interviews or applications. Still, there are chances for getting a new job, or progress in the existing job. You must control your words with your colleagues, otherwise there will be conflicts. The health also will need more care, so some of you will go for health check-ups.

horoscopes.title: Scorpio Weekly Horoscope Starting April 5
content: The Sun is in the sixth house, and Mars also will enter in this same house, so you will have to work in fast-paced environments at work. Both the planets are not peacemakers, so you will have some arguments with your colleagues, so stay away from conflicts, otherwise it will impact the quality of your work. Job seekers will get a clear picture, and updates about their job applications too. You will be also taking part in competitive events like sports or interviews too. The health also will be very important, and the diet has to be healthy, as the lower abdomen will be sensitive.

Venus will be impacting the seventh house, so the relationships will be very important, and there will be noticeable developments in the same. You will have positive interactions with your spouse or partner, and there will be unity between both. If you are a business owner, you will start a new business deal, or progress in the existing projects as well. Single Scorpio Sun, Moon or rising signs will have the closest opportunities to find someone your life. There will be social gatherings, entertainment programs or business meets where you meet new people as well.

Transit Mercury is moving through the fifth house, which will bring secret developments in romance, creativity, and personal expression. There will be a lot of conversation with young groups, and you also will feel bit younger as the iron sharpens iron. Creative ideas will flow quickly, and you will start a new passion project. Parents will attend meetings at school to review the performance of their children. This is a good time to study about new business ventures, but this is not the time to invest, as Mercury will soon move into the sixth house of liabilities. For the time being just enjoy, eat and sleep.

horoscopes.title: Sagittarius Weekly Horoscope Starting April 5
content: A noticeable change will be occurring in your life, and Mars will move into the fifth house, so it can be in your passion projects or studies. The Sun and Mars are in Aries, so you will not be able to stop yourself from meeting your friends, and spending time for enjoyment. However, both the planets are argumentative, so there will be conflicts too. Someone will make a move forward to you, or you take the first step in proposing. Passion projects will be the highlight of this week, but the planetary placement do not support you starting something. There are chances for parents to attend school meetings so that they will get the updates.

Venus is moving through the sixth house will impact the work and daily routine. Venus is a benefic planet, so this transit will bring some solution for the existing workplace issue or health issues. It will be like you getting some support from the colleagues, resolving tension, or getting better or easy projects. Job seekers will get the closest opportunities to find a job, so please expand the job search. The health also improves, but please stay away from junk diet, and also sugar cravings.

The home and family will have significant events as transit Mercury is moving through the fourth house. Since Mercury indicates communication, you will have a lot of conversations with the family members. You will get some updates about your relatives, or you will hold or attend family gatherings. There will be events like clutter clearing, repairing and other home improvement projects. You may even meet a real estate agent, builder or an interior designer. Since Mercury indicates youngsters, your home will be visited by the youth, and they ca be your relatives or friends. This transit will bring a lot of short activities at home.

horoscopes.title: Capricorn Weekly Horoscope Starting April 5
content: The Sun and Mars are moving through the fourth house, and both doesn’t like to be here, as it is a private place. There will be fructification of a long waited event at home, like discussion with a family member, a decision about living arrangements, or handling family responsibility. You will take charge quickly, especially related to fixing, repairing, or other home improvement projects. There is a strong indication about tension at home, so, stay away from all kind of arguments at home. Elderly figures at home will have multiple concerns including health, finance and emotional strength.

Venus is moving through the fifth house, so there will be visible developments in the love life, as Venus is the main indicator of love. Single Capricorn Sun, Moon and rising natives will have the closest opportunities to find someone special. Someone will show some interest in your, or an existing connection will be warmer, and you will feel the need to get loved. Your creative abilities also will get noticed by the public, and there will be more recognition through the creative activities. This Venus will also bring good news about children, or they will have a personal project. You will also get opportunities to roam around with youngsters, and attend entertainment programs.

Mercury will bring multiple projects, from the communication based domains like messages, short term decisions, which needs quick thinking. You will get a lot of calls, texts, or conversations, that lead to multiple actions, so get ready to multitask. You will have multiple travel plans, but they will be stressful. This transit will also bring opportunities for working in media related domain like teaching, preaching, and writing. There will be a discussion with sibling, neighbour or a colleague, and these meetings can come up online or offline too.

horoscopes.title: Aquarius Weekly Horoscope Starting April 5
content: The Sun is moving through Aries, and Mars will enter the fire sign Aries, so get ready for multitasking. This transit will bring a surge of activity in communications, decisions, or day to day interactions. You will have a lot of online and offline communications, which can be about your projects. This transit will bring a lot of conversations with neighbours, siblings and other network circles. Both the planets will bring projects from writing, teaching, preaching and counselling too. If you are planning to start a business, please postpone that as Mars is not a good planet to be in the third house.

Venus will impact the fourth house, and that will bring noticeable shifts within your home, and personal space. Venus is a natural benefic, so your family situation will improve, and you will get enough support from your family members. There will be events like clutter clearing, home improvement projects, repairs and other events connected to land and property. You will also buy some devices for home to improve the life, and this transit will bring the family members together, and there will be family functions too. This Venus will also bring work from home opportunities too.

Mercury will impact the second house and that will bring concrete developments around money and expenses. Mercury will be leaving this sign soon, so you will have many opportunities find a new job, new projects, or appraisals as well. Mercury is debilitated in the second house, so there are chances for sudden or unwanted expenses, so make sure you avoid that. Mercury indicates communication, so you will have a lot of ideas about new financial plans too. You will also go for repayment, restructuring your loans, tax and PF related matters. This Mercury also will bring opportunities for upskilling, which will help you at work.

horoscopes.title: Pisces Weekly Horoscope Starting April 5
content: For the next forty plus days, your financial matters will be very important as the Sun is in the second house, and Mars will enter Aries during this week. Both are fiery and malefic by nature, so there will be a lot of expenses, and you should control that. This is not the right time to take a new loan, new investment plan or any long term plans. The second house indicates speech, and there will be harsh speech, so there will be arguments within the family or in the workplace. You should also take care of your diet and health, and the facial area will need some treatments.

Venus is moving through the third house, and it will bring noticeable developments in communication. You will get good contacts from the media, and you will take part in social media activities. There will be many opportunities to work in writing, teaching and counselling domain as well. You will have short trips, casual meetings, or social exchanges which will bring good results. There will be better understanding with your siblings, neighbours, and people in your network settings. Traveling will be the main theme of this week and it can be short or long trips.

Mercury is moving through your sign, so you will have personal plans and conversations about your personal life. You will not be able to stay passive, so people will expect answers from you. You will speak up, and clarify your position or take new decision about your career too. However, when Mercury is in the first house, so you may overthink and prone to stress. Kindly avoid getting into any stressful activity, and you will get public speaking opportunities too. Altogether you will do a lot of things for personal and professional life, which will make you busier.
